name: ADR validator confirms a deciders field is present per the MADR template requirement
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1\nstatus: accepted\n' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check deciders 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*deciders' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
